content:
When did you break the rules—and why?
If you could rewrite one law, what would it be?


✅ Why This Works:
• Keeps the pre-class prompts broad & accessible.
• Keeps the post-class prompts reflective & tied to course themes.
• Ties directly into human experience & the literary lens.

2️⃣ Student Pathways (Refined & Given Archetypal Names)

Each student pathway now has a dual-name system (one negative & one positive descriptor) reflecting different academic archetypes.

📜 Path A: The Debate Champion / The Seat Warmer
